info.name: CatchWatch & Support
info.description: CatchWatch Backend API Collection with bodies

request.description: Get profile statistics (total reels, total likes/dislikes, followers, and following count) for a user. Requires Bearer Token.

variable.description: The ID of the movie, series, or reel you want to like.

request.description: Toggle a like on a content item. Auto-detects content type from database. Removes dislike if present. Requires Bearer Token.

variable.description: The ID of the movie, series, or reel you want to dislike.

request.description: Toggle a dislike on a content item. Auto-detects content type from database. Removes like if present. Requires Bearer Token.
Follow or unfollow a user. Requires Bearer Token.

header.description: Optional Bearer Token to map requester's userInteraction state

variable.description: The ID of the movie, series, or reel.

request.description: Get interaction stats (likes count, dislikes count, and paginated list of users). Auto-detects content type. Optional Auth header returns current user interaction.
Get follow counts and paginated followers or following lists.
Upload a new video reel. Expects Bearer Token. Uses multipart/form-data.

header.description: Optional Bearer Token to map userInteraction state

request.description: Get active reels feed. Optional authentication header is accepted to check userInteraction.

header.description: Optional Bearer Token to map userInteraction state

request.description: Get detailed stats and properties for a single reel.
Soft delete a reel. Must be the reel owner. Requires Bearer Token.
Increment viewsCount for a reel by 1.
Increment sharesCount for a reel by 1.
